sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56283" key="kafw/rh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καφώρη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n56283.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">she fox</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σκαφώρη</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
